subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth the most sacred and exalted Sanctuary of the Desired One, Who hath drawn the world through His Supreme Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که عالم را بکلمه علیا جذب
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
